Name: M1 - Add customer with valid data
Description: Verify that a bank manager can add a new customer with valid data

Name: C8 - Transaction appears after deposit
Description: Verify deposit appears as Credit in transaction history

Name: M4b - Customer appears in customers list
Description: Verify that an added customer appears in the customers list

Name: M3 - Name should reject special characters
Description: BUG-002 | Customer name field accepts special characters. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'John@#$' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John@#$' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation ^[a-zA-Z]+$

Name: C10 - Transaction history persists
Description: Verify transactions persist after navigating away and back

Name: C1 - Customer login
Description: Verify customer can login and see welcome message with their name

Name: testAddMultipleCustomers(String, String, String) M1b - Add customer: TestBob TestBrown
Description: Verify multiple customers can be added with different valid data from JSON

Name: M2 - Name should reject numbers
Description: BUG-001 | Customer name field accepts numbers. Expected: Only alphabetic characters allowed. Actual: 'John123' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter 'John123' as first name → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add regex validation for alphabetic-only names

Name: C6 - Withdraw more than balance rejected
Description: Verify withdrawing more than balance shows error

Name: E2E - Full banking lifecycle
Description: Complete lifecycle: Manager creates customer and account → Customer logs in, deposits, withdraws, verifies transactions → Customer logs out → Manager confirms customer still exists. Single browser session, no shortcuts.

Name: C9 - Transaction appears after withdrawal
Description: Verify withdrawal appears as Debit in transaction history

Name: testAddMultipleCustomers(String, String, String) M1b - Add customer: TestJane TestSmith
Description: Verify multiple customers can be added with different valid data from JSON

Name: M8 - Deleted customer can't login
Description: Verify that a deleted customer no longer appears in the customer login dropdown

Name: C3 - Deposit valid amount
Description: Verify deposit increases balance by exact amount

Name: C4 - Deposit zero rejected
Description: Verify depositing zero does not change balance

Name: M7 - Delete customer
Description: Verify that a bank manager can delete a customer from the list

Name: testAddMultipleCustomers(String, String, String) M1b - Add customer: TestJohn TestDoe
Description: Verify multiple customers can be added with different valid data from JSON

Name: C5 - Withdraw valid amount
Description: Verify withdrawal decreases balance by exact amount

Name: C2 - View transactions (empty)
Description: Verify new account has empty transaction history

Name: M5 - Open account for existing customer
Description: Verify that a bank manager can open an account for an existing customer

Name: M4 - Postal code should reject non-numeric
Description: BUG-003 | Postal code field accepts non-numeric input. Expected: Only numeric characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'ABCDEF' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter valid names → enter 'ABCDEF' as post code → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add numeric-only validation for postal code

Name: C7 - Withdraw zero rejected
Description: Verify withdrawing zero does not change balance
